lineage.Process: Append Westchester_RC_line_Dis Westchester_RC_line NO_TEST "Description "Description" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,Description,-1,-1;Photo_date "Photo_date" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,Photo_date,-1,-1;NAME "NAME" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,NAME,-1,-1;Source "Source" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,Source,-1,-1;FEA_Code "FEA_Code" true true false 4 Long 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,FEA_Code,-1,-1;STRCL_CODE "STRCL_CODE" true true false 4 Long 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,STRCL_CODE,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,Shape_Length,-1,-1" #

Append Westchester_RC_line_Dis Westchester_RC_line NO_TEST "Description "Description" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,Description,-1,-1;Photo_date "Photo_date" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,Photo_date,-1,-1;NAME "NAME" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,NAME,-1,-1;Source "Source" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,Source,-1,-1;FEA_Code "FEA_Code" true true false 4 Long 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,FEA_Code,-1,-1;STRCL_CODE "STRCL_CODE" true true false 4 Long 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,STRCL_CODE,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,Shape_Length,-1,-1" #

Append Westchester_RC_line_Dis Westchester_RC_line NO_TEST "Description "Description" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,Description,-1,-1;Photo_date "Photo_date" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,Photo_date,-1,-1;NAME "NAME" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,NAME,-1,-1;Source "Source" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,Source,-1,-1;FEA_Code "FEA_Code" true true false 4 Long 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,FEA_Code,-1,-1;STRCL_CODE "STRCL_CODE" true true false 4 Long 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,STRCL_CODE,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,Westchester_RC_line_Dis,Shape_Length,-1,-1" #
CalculateField bmroads NAME "BARON DE HIRSCH RD" PYTHON_9.3 #

#;BASEMAPPING.sidewalks FeatureClass sidewalks #"

Append D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\4131_Block01&02.gdb\DATA\bmroads;D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\Block_3456_Seamless.gdb\DATA\bmroads D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\4131_Template.gdb\DATA\bmroads NO_TEST "DESCRIPTION "Description" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\4131_Block01&02.gdb\DATA\bmroads,DESCRIPTION,-1,-1,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\Block_3456_Seamless.gdb\DATA\bmroads,DESCRIPTION,-1,-1;PHOTO_DATE "Photo_date" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\4131_Block01&02.gdb\DATA\bmroads,PHOTO_DATE,-1,-1,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\Block_3456_Seamless.gdb\DATA\bmroads,PHOTO_DATE,-1,-1;NAME "NAME" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\4131_Block01&02.gdb\DATA\bmroads,NAME,-1,-1,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\Block_3456_Seamless.gdb\DATA\bmroads,NAME,-1,-1;SOURCE "Source" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\4131_Block01&02.gdb\DATA\bmroads,SOURCE,-1,-1,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\Block_3456_Seamless.gdb\DATA\bmroads,SOURCE,-1,-1;FEA_CODE "FEA_Code" true true false 4 Long 0 0 ,First,#,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\4131_Block01&02.gdb\DATA\bmroads,FEA_CODE,-1,-1,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\Block_3456_Seamless.gdb\DATA\bmroads,FEA_CODE,-1,-1;STRCL_CODE "STRCL_CODE" true true false 4 Long 0 0 ,First,#,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\4131_Block01&02.gdb\DATA\bmroads,STRCL_CODE,-1,-1,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\Block_3456_Seamless.gdb\DATA\bmroads,STRCL_CODE,-1,-1;SHAPE_Length "SHAPE_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\4131_Block01&02.gdb\DATA\bmroads,SHAPE_Length,-1,-1,D:\Shared\PNG\4131\21-02-2024\gdb\Block_3456_Seamless.gdb\DATA\bmroads,SHAPE_Length,-1,-1" #

CopyMultiple "S:\Base_Mapping\2023\ProjMgmt\Data_from_IIC\FINAL\Planimetrics\Countywide\Planimetrics_2023.gdb\bmroads FeatureClass;S:\Base_Mapping\2023\ProjMgmt\Data_from_IIC\FINAL\Planimetrics\Countywide\Planimetrics_2023.gdb\bmstream FeatureClass;S:\Base_Mapping\2023\ProjMgmt\Data_from_IIC\FINAL\Planimetrics\Countywide\Planimetrics_2023.gdb\driveways FeatureClass;S:\Base_Mapping\2023\ProjMgmt\Data_from_IIC\FINAL\Planimetrics\Countywide\Planimetrics_2023.gdb\parking FeatureClass;S:\Base_Mapping\2023\ProjMgmt\Data_from_IIC\FINAL\Planimetrics\Countywide\Planimetrics_2023.gdb\roadways FeatureClass;S:\Base_Mapping\2023\ProjMgmt\Data_from_IIC\FINAL\Planimetrics\Countywide\Planimetrics_2023.gdb\sidewalks FeatureClass" "C:\Users\xxc1\AppData\Roaming\ESRI\ArcGISPro\Favorites\BASEMAPPING@gispvec_moblracp-scan (1).sde" bmroads_1;bmstream_1;driveways_1;parking_1;roadways_1;sidewalks_1 "bmroads FeatureClass BASEMAPPING.bmroads_1 #;bmstream FeatureClass BASEMAPPING.bmstream_1 #;driveways FeatureClass BASEMAPPING.driveways_1 #;parking FeatureClass BASEMAPPING.parking_1 #;roadways FeatureClass BASEMAPPING.roadways_1 #;sidewalks FeatureClass BASEMAPPING.sidewalks_1 #"

ExportFeatures bmroads C:\Users\tnr1\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\DougProject\DougProject.gdb\bmroads_line # NOT_USE_ALIAS "DESCRIPTION "Description" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,bmroads,DESCRIPTION,0,50;PHOTO_DATE "Photo_date" true true false 8 Date 0 0,First,#,bmroads,PHOTO_DATE,-1,-1;NAME "NAME" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,bmroads,NAME,0,50;SOURCE "Source" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,bmroads,SOURCE,0,50;FEA_CODE "FEA_Code" true true false 4 Long 0 10,First,#,bmroads,FEA_CODE,-1,-1;STRCL_CODE "STRCL_CODE" true true false 4 Long 0 10,First,#,bmroads,STRCL_CODE,-1,-1" #

ExportFeatures C:\Users\tnr1\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\DougProject\DougProject.gdb\bmroads_line C:\Users\tnr1\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\countyroads_line.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "DESCRIPTION "Description" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,C:\Users\tnr1\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\DougProject\DougProject.gdb\bmroads_line,DESCRIPTION,0,50;PHOTO_DATE "Photo_date" true true false 8 Date 0 0,First,#,C:\Users\tnr1\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\DougProject\DougProject.gdb\bmroads_line,PHOTO_DATE,-1,-1;NAME "NAME" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,C:\Users\tnr1\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\DougProject\DougProject.gdb\bmroads_line,NAME,0,50;SOURCE "Source" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,C:\Users\tnr1\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\DougProject\DougProject.gdb\bmroads_line,SOURCE,0,50;FEA_CODE "FEA_Code" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,C:\Users\tnr1\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\DougProject\DougProject.gdb\bmroads_line,FEA_CODE,-1,-1;STRCL_CODE "STRCL_CODE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,C:\Users\tnr1\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\DougProject\DougProject.gdb\bmroads_line,STRCL_CODE,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,C:\Users\tnr1\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\DougProject\DougProject.gdb\bmroads_line,Shape_Length,-1,-1" #

rpCntInfo.cntHours: Monday - Friday; 8:30 am to 4:30 pm; closed on holidays

distorFormat.formatName: Shape file, personal geodatabase or web service

rpCntInfo.cntHours: Monday - Friday; 8:30 am to 4:30 pm; closed on holidays
Monday - Friday; 8:30 am to 4:30 pm; closed on holidays
Monday - Friday; 8:30 am to 4:30 pm; closed on holidays
Monday - Friday; 8:30 am to 4:30 pm; closed on holidays

dataExt.exDesc: The geographic extents of this dataset includes entire Westchester County, NY with 200 ft buffer

dataIdInfo.idPurp: This Road Center Line dataset, photogrammetrically compiled and published at a scale of 1"=100', was produced from aerial imagery collected in April 2023 using UltraCAM Eagle camera and covers entire Westchester County,NY. It is described as 'RoadCenterLine_line' and delivered as a planimetric layer from 2023 imagery compiled/updated in 3D environment using 6" GSD imagery. The layer includes road centerlines represented at the physical center of the road seperated by travel way as required.
dataIdInfo.idAbs: The Road Center Line layer is intended to be used as one of the base layers with other digital layers such as cadastral features, topography and orthophotos.

rpCntInfo.cntHours: Monday - Friday; 8:30 am to 4:30 pm; closed on holidays
Monday - Friday; 8:30 am to 4:30 pm; closed on holidays
Monday - Friday; 8:30 am to 4:30 pm; closed on holidays

report.evalMethDesc: Data processed with April 2018 imagery was validated using the orthoimagery for completeness and classification of the features.

rpCntInfo.cntHours: Monday - Friday; 8:30 am to 4:30 pm; closed on holidays

ConResult.conExpl: Data accepted after independent QA review by County GIS and LiRo GIS and Survey P.C.

report.measDesc: Random sampling approach was followed for checking the completness of the data.

dataLineage.statement: The dataset was derived using the existing datasets (last updated in 2013) and updated using 6" RGB imagery collected during April 2018. An UltraCAM sensor was used for collection of the imagery and orthophotos were developed using Z/I suite of software. Barrier layer was validated using the orthophotos and updates were performed in Z/I environment. The data was validated by County GIS and LiRo GIS and Survey P.C. as an independent QA review for completness of the data and consistency in data collection.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: A unique value defining the feature type. The features are represented as 2900; 2901; 2910; 2930; 2931 and completement the Description field. The code values and their description values are given below: 2900 - Paved Road Center Line 2901 - Hidden Paved Road Center Line 2910 - Unpaved Road Center Line 2930 - Trail Bike Path Center Line 2931 - Hidden Trail Bike Path Center Line
Name of the road as avaialble.
Source used for populating the road name.
Date of the photography which was used for data compilation.
